UserComments.Comment: The charging station worx properly,but E.On company repeatedly performed deceptive behavior with goal to cheat U with pricing.For example their 8hrs.limit counts also for night,even they tell/write U the opposite,it is a trap,also they often charge U day-price(9.5CZK/KWh) also @ night(when they announce 8CZK/KWh),they r always lieing with pricing,be aware & do not forget interrupt charging every 8hrs.to avoid extra fees & do so also during night,they announced,that parking fee free minutes r not being deducted during night,but they R & by believing them 1ce,i was charged extra 745CZK.E.On is a highly deceptive company.
I miss a shade nearby.Otherwise good charging station.This charging station did not apeared on my bill,thus i charged for free here.Live long & prosper.

UsageCost: Officially 8CZK/KWh for E.On registered members,but there is possibly a SW error causing,it did not appeared on my monthly bill.I authenticated the charging by E.On Drive RFID card,but finally I was not charged for this charging, may be temporary or permanent error,not guaranteed, but U have a chance, U will not have to pay @ all(AC-i do not use DC,thus I do not know,is the bug only influencing AC or all charging here).

AddressInfo.Title: E.On Charging Station.
AddressInfo.AddressLine1: Within car-selling company's area-on its parking lot.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Within a private-company area,may be inaccessible, when the company is closed.The charging station is officially public.

GeneralComments: Dock carefully, there is a steep downhill behind the charging station.
